name: ElmArk.Msgs
comment:
A Msg type for dealing with API responses

@docs Msg

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: A Msg representing one of the various HTTP response types.

name: ElmArk.Account

aliases.name: Account
aliases.type: { address : String, unconfirmedBalance : String, balance : String, publicKey : String, unconfirmedSignature : Int, secondSignature : Int, secondPublicKey : String, multisignatures : List String, u_multisignatures : List String }

aliases.name: Accounts
aliases.comment: Represents the result of running the getAccount

aliases.name: Balance
aliases.comment:
The balance record returned by ark.

Sample JSON:

    {
        "success": true,
        "balance": "21231062440",
        "unconfirmedBalance": "21231062440"
    }
aliases.type: { success : Bool, balance : String, unconfirmedBalance : String }

aliases.name: Delegate
aliases.type: { username : String, address : String, publicKey : String, vote : String, producedblocks : Int, missedblocks : Int, rate : Int, approval : Float, productivity : Float }

aliases.name: DelegateFee
Delegates
aliases.comment:
A list of delegates.

Sample JSON:

    {
        "success": true,
        "delegates": [
            {
                "username": "bioly",
                "address": "AbUdMhk96FbzxH7vDYAwdyqUELmLopZV5x",
                "publicKey": "02c0b645f19ab304d25aae3add139edd9f6ca9fd0d98e57a808100de0e93832181",
                "vote": "179820519458568",
                "producedblocks": 57624,
                "missedblocks": 254,
                "rate": 2,
                "approval": 1.37,
                "productivity": 99.56
            }
        ]
    }

aliases.name: PublicKey
TopAccount
aliases.comment:
Record representing a top account.
Sample JSON:
```
{
    "address": "AUDud8tvyVZa67p3QY7XPRUTjRGnWQQ9Xv",
    "balance": "2125000000000000",
    "publicKey": "021d03bace0687a1a5e797f884b13fb46f817ec32de1374a7f223f24404401d220"
}
```
aliases.type: { address : String, balance : String, publicKey : String }

aliases.name: TopAccounts

values.name: decodeAccount
values.comment: Turns account JSON into Account record

values.name: decodeAccounts
values.comment: Parses getAccoutns JSON into an Accounts record

values.name: decodeBalance
values.comment: decodeBalance parses JSON and turns it into a Balance record

values.name: decodeDelegate
values.comment: decodeDelegate turns a JSON string into a Delegate

values.name: decodeDelegateFee
values.comment: decodeDelegateFee turns a JSON into a DelegateFee record

values.name: decodeDelegates
values.comment: Turns JSON into a list of delegates

values.name: decodePublicKey
values.comment: decodePublicKey parses JSON and turns it into a PublicKey record

values.name: decodeTopAccount
values.comment: Parses JSON string into TopAccount record

values.name: decodeTopAccounts
values.comment: Parses JSON into TopAccounts record

values.name: encodeAccount
values.comment: encodeAccount turns account record into JSON string

values.name: encodeAccounts
values.comment: encodeAccounts turns accounts record into JSON string

values.name: encodeBalance
values.comment: encodeBalance turns a Balance record into a JSON string

values.name: encodeDelegate
values.comment: encodeDelegate turns a Delegate Record into a JSON

values.name: encodeDelegateFee
values.comment: encodeDelegateFee turns a DelegateFee record into a JSON string

values.name: encodeDelegates
values.comment: Turns a list of delegates into JSON

values.name: encodePublicKey
values.comment: encodePublicKey turns JSON into a PublicKey record

values.name: encodeTopAccount
values.comment: Turns TopAccount record into JSON

values.name: encodeTopAccounts
values.comment: Turns TopAccounts record into JSON string

values.name: getAccount
values.comment:
Get an account's info

    mainNet
        |> getAccount "AUexKjGtgsSpVzPLs6jNMM6vJ6znEVTQWK"

values.name: getBalance
values.comment:
Get an account's balance

    mainNet
        |> getBalance "AUexKjGtgsSpVzPLs6jNMM6vJ6znEVTQWK"

values.name: getDelegateFee
values.comment:
Get the current delegate fee

    mainNet
        |> getDelegateFee

values.name: getDelegates
values.comment:
Get the current delegate fee

    mainNet
        |> getDelegates "AbUdMhk96FbzxH7vDYAwdyqUELmLopZV5x"

values.name: getPublicKey
values.comment:
Get an account's public key

    mainNet
        |> getPublicKey "AUexKjGtgsSpVzPLs6jNMM6vJ6znEVTQWK"

values.name: getTopAccounts
values.comment:
Get a list of top accounts

    mainNet
        |> getTopAccounts

name: ElmArk.Api

values.name: devNet
values.comment:
Contains the URL and required headers for making
a request to the Ark dev/test network

    devNet == { url = "http://167.114.29.52:4002/"
    , headers =
        [ (header "nethash" "578e820911f24e039733b45e4882b73e301f813a0d2c31330dafda84534ffa23")
        , (header "version" "1.1.1")
        , (header "port" "4002")
        ]
    }

values.name: mainNet
values.comment:
Contains the URL and required headers for making
a request to the Ark mainnet

Ark main net, refers to this IP
"http://37.59.129.164:4001/"

    mainNet == { url = "https://api.arknode.net/"
    , headers =
        [ (header "nethash" "6e84d08bd299ed97c212c886c98a57e36545c8f5d645ca7eeae63a8bd62d8988")
        , (header "version" "1.0.1")
        , (header "port" "4001")
        ]
    }

values.name: send
values.comment:
Sends the HTTP request

    mainNet
        |> getBalance "AUexKjGtgsSpVzPLs6jNMM6vJ6znEVTQWK"
        |> send ReceiveAccountBalance decodeBalance
values.type: (Result Error a -> msg) -> Decoder a -> ( RequestHead, RequestBody ) -> Cmd msg
